_metadata.purpose: Authoritative, vetted CRPT reference data for the tracker app. This file is the SOURCE OF TRUTH for holdings and fund facts. When any other source disagrees, this file wins.
_metadata.source_of_truth: First Trust official CRPT holdings export (CRPT-Holdings.xlsx), the fund's own daily holdings file.
data_honesty_rules: Everything in this file is a point-in-time snapshot. Label holdings 'as of 2026-07-17' in the UI. CRPT is actively managed; weights change daily.
NEVER hardcode a live price. Prices/returns come from a runtime market-data adapter, not this file. The performance figures below are labeled historical snapshots for reference only.

When third-party sources (Morningstar, StockAnalysis, Yahoo) disagree with this file on holdings or weights, this file is correct. The disagreements are date/vendor differences, not errors to reconcile. See source_conflicts below.
Do not fabricate any figure. If a needed value is not in this file and not returned by the adapter, show 'no data', never a guess.

fund.etf_name: First Trust SkyBridge Crypto Industry and Digital Economy ETF
fund.investor_servicing_agent: Bank of New York Mellon Corp
fund.mandate_summary: Under normal conditions invests >=80% of net assets in common stocks and ADRs of Crypto Industry and Digital Economy companies, with >=50% of net assets specifically in Crypto Industry Companies.

current_fund_data.note: Snapshot from First Trust fund page. Reference only; refresh via adapter for live values.

holdings.untickered_holdings_warning: Some third-party sites (Morningstar 7/19, StockAnalysis 7/9) list a top holding 'Ft Sky Crypt Cym 1002063' at ~19-20% with NO ticker/CUSIP. It is NOT in First Trust's official file (this file). It is almost certainly a SkyBridge-affiliated Cayman feeder/sleeve reported via look-through here. IF it ever appears in holdings data, the app must treat it as UN-PRICEABLE via market-data APIs: no ticker fetch, mark from fund data only. Never send it to the price adapter.

line_items.name: Metaplanet Inc.
line_items.note: Japan-listed (Tokyo 3350). Non-US ticker: Bloomberg '3350 JP Equity', Yahoo '3350.T'. Many free APIs lack coverage. Handle explicitly in the adapter.

line_items.name: Strive, Inc. (Class A)
line_items.note: Classification 'Health Care Equipment & Supplies' comes straight from the fund file. It looks odd for a crypto-treasury company (Strive/ASST) but it is the fund's own GICS tag. Display as-is; do not silently 'correct' it. Flag to Leo for a footnote if shown to Svolos.

holdings.exposure_buckets_note: Useful groupings the UI can surface. Computed from this file's weights.

direct_btc_etfs.label: Direct Bitcoin exposure via spot BTC ETFs

performance_snapshot.note: HISTORICAL reference figures. Do NOT present as current. The app's live chart must be computed from the adapter's price series, not from these static numbers. Trailing returns are the crypto-equity story: severe drawdown YTD/1Y, strong 3Y. Benchmarked against S&P 500 by First Trust (a deliberately conservative benchmark that flatters equity indices vs a crypto fund).

three_year_statistics.note: 3Y stats as of 6/30/2026, CRPT vs S&P 500. This is the risk story worth surfacing: crypto-equity beta and volatility are extreme.

annual_total_return_pct_by_year.note: Calendar-year price returns. Shows the extreme cyclicality: -80.84% (2022), +193.86% (2023), +75.29% (2024), -9.52% (2025), -23.76% YTD 2026.

premium_discount_history.note: Days traded at premium vs discount, by period. Trades near NAV most days with occasional spikes.

benchmark_config.note: First Trust benchmarks CRPT against the S&P 500, which is standard for the fund but misleading for judging a crypto-industry ETF in isolation. For an internal SkyBridge tool, show MORE THAN ONE. Recommend a spot-BTC proxy AND a crypto-equity peer AND a broad-equity reference so the viewer can separate 'is crypto up' from 'is CRPT beating its own category'.

tertiary.label: S&P 500 (broad equity reference, matches First Trust's official benchmark)

source_conflicts.note: Documented so the app (and Leo) know WHY vetted sources disagree. All are date/vendor artifacts, not errors. This file (First Trust official, 7/17) is authoritative.

holdings_count.resolution: Use 19 securities (20 lines incl. cash). Lower counts are stale or exclude BTC-ETF lines.

net_assets.resolution: Use First Trust 84.12M (7/17). Others are different dates.

top_holding_ghost.issue: Morningstar/StockAnalysis show 'Ft Sky Crypt Cym 1002063' ~19-20% as #1; absent from First Trust official file.
top_holding_ghost.resolution: Treat as a look-through/reporting artifact of a SkyBridge Cayman feeder. Not priceable. Do not add to holdings unless it appears in the official file.
